acceptOffer(address,uint256,address,addr.details: Intended for delegatecall from the marketplace proxy. Direct calls to the settlement implementation revert.

buyBatch(address,address,address,(uint25.details: Intended for delegatecall from the marketplace proxy. Direct calls to the settlement implementation revert.

checkout((uint8,address,address,address,.details: Intended for delegatecall from the marketplace proxy. Direct calls to the settlement implementation revert.

executeCheckoutItem((uint8,address,addre.details: Settlement-only entrypoint; the marketplace proxy does not expose this selector.

executeCheckoutPayout((uint8,address,add.details: Settlement-only entrypoint; the marketplace proxy does not expose this selector.

mintDirectSaleBatch(address,address,(uin.details: Intended for delegatecall from the marketplace proxy. Direct calls to the settlement implementation revert.

acceptOffer(address,uint256,address,addr.notice: Accepts all or part of an ERC1155 token offer.

buyBatch(address,address,address,(uint25.notice: Buys tokens from a seller's secondary fixed-price listings.

checkout((uint8,address,address,address,.notice: Executes a buyer cart of direct-sale mints and secondary fixed-price listing purchases.

executeCheckoutItem((uint8,address,addre.notice: Executes one already validated checkout item through a nested delegatecall rollback boundary.

executeCheckoutPayout((uint8,address,add.notice: Executes payout for a checkout item through a nested rollback boundary.

mintDirectSaleBatch(address,address,(uin.notice: Mints tokens from configured primary sales.
